response: {"name":"Proteinase K","description":"A broad-spectrum serine protease enzyme used in molecular biology to digest and remove proteins (such as RNA-binding proteins) from nucleic acid complexes, commonly used in CLIP-seq and related protocols to release crosslinked RNA from nitrocellulose membranes after RBP immunoprecipitation.","language":null,"github_repo":null,"bioconda_package":null,"pypi_package":null,"cran_package":null,"license_type":"unknown","open_source_alternative":null,"docker_image":null}
